user.title: Cosmo account
user.description: Enter the email for your COSMO Mission Control / parent account. A one-time code will be emailed to you.

otp.title: Enter login code
otp.description: Enter the one-time code sent to {email}.

error.send_failed: Couldn't request a login code. Check the email and try again.
error.invalid_code: That code wasn't accepted. Request a new one and retry.

abort.no_devices: No watches were found on this account.
abort.already_configured: This watch is already set up.
